implemented: published-only public cities, categories, amenities, place search, place details and bounded GeoJSON map endpoints
parameterized PostGIS discovery queries with age, radius, bounding box, amenity AND, boolean, text and open-now filters
stable pagination and documented distance, name, verification recency and relevance ordering
RFC Problem Details responses with correlation IDs and endpoint-specific rate limiting
authenticated administrator draft creation and submit, publish, unpublish, reverify, close and archive workflow actions
OpenAPI discovery contract and generated TypeScript client

architecture.publicReadPort: Discovery Application PlaceReadModel implemented by parameterized Doctrine DBAL
architecture.adminWritePort: Places Application AdminPlaceGateway implemented by Doctrine DBAL
architecture.controllerBoundary: UI controllers depend on Application services and ports only

results.publicApiRegression: PASS: reference data, amenities AND, radius/distance, GeoJSON map and invalid-query Problem Details
results.sqlInjectionProbe: PASS: parameterized query returned zero results
results.openNow: PASS: weekly and special opening intervals evaluated in place-local time
results.adminRuntimeWorkflow: PASS: login, create draft, submit, publish and public API visibility
results.spatialQueryPlan: PASS: idx_places_location used for bounded map query on a synthetic 10000-row dataset
results.queryCount: PASS: list projections use bounded aggregate subqueries without per-result application queries
results.openApiGeneration: PASS: repeated generation produced identical SHA-256 diff
results.productionRuntime: PASS: health, discovery and admin authentication redirect

findingsClosed: admin authentication test now sends the Origin header required by Symfony stateless CSRF, matching browser form submission
test service replacement remains active after login by disabling kernel reboot in the focused authorization test
map intersection remains geography-native so PostgreSQL uses idx_places_location instead of a sequential scan
correlation ID attribute moved to Shared Application so UI does not depend on Shared Infrastructure
generated client regeneration verified as deterministic under the required Node 24 toolchain
knownLimitations: C2B provides the authenticated catalogue workflow through custom Symfony controllers integrated with the EasyAdmin dashboard rather than entity CRUD classes
same-origin SSR resource routes and catalogue pages belong to C2C and are intentionally not implemented here
Google login, public registration, favorites, reviews, forum and uploads remain explicitly outside C2
externalConfigurationRequired: create production administrators explicitly with app:user:create-admin
configure production secrets and trusted proxy/origin settings
nextAction: Commit and push C2B, verify the remote SHA, then begin C2C without implementing C3.
